name: First Conversation
message: After three years our conversation finally started.

name: First Meet Up
message: Just five days after our first conversation, we finally met in person and talked for the first time. That was also the first time we ate together and walked around BGC.

name: Graduation Day
message: After we had graduated, I asked you out for a night date. We found a beautiful spot with someone singing, and in that perfect moment, I knew it was the right time and place to court you.

name: First Batangas Together
message: From August 13 to 15, we celebrated your graduation and your brother's birthday in your hometown of Lobo, Batangas. You even introduced me as your suitor to your whole family, and you took me to the sea for the first time.

name: Introducing You to My Family
message: This is unexpected. After you introduced me to your family, I’ve now introduced you to mine. That was also the first time we had lunch together with you and my family, and we took our first family picture.

name: Our First Movie Date
message: First time watching a movie together in the cinema. We watched My Daughter is a Zombie because you are a fan of Korean dramas and you don't like horror movies.

name: Antipolo Day Trip
message: After Dean's birthday celebration, we took an unplanned day trip to Cloud 360 Antipolo View. We crossed the hanging bridge to reach the top of the tower, screaming in fear along the way. You also placed the bracelet you bought for us on the love lock since we didn’t have anything else, and we left our first bracelet there together. After that, we went to Hinulugang Taktak to tour around and enjoy a meal.

name: Supporting You for the First Contest
message: Your documentary film was a finalist in the 37th CCP Gawad Alternatibo, and we attended with your group of friends. I was one of your supporter. That day, I saw your reaction in person. You were so happy, and I felt really proud of you because your film had the Best Editing among all 52 finalists and also won first place in the documentary category.

name: Anniversary Date
message: The day our relationship became official.

name: Birthday Gift
message: This is the day, the day I finally get to show you this website as your gift. I’m your photographer and videographer, here to make you happy, to film your “Multo”, and to take your birthday photos. After everything happened, we were so tired from all the rushing and walking around. Then we celebrated your birthday with your family, and we even talked about some very personal things hahaha.

name: My Facebook Cover Photo
message: I updated my cover photo because I already have a special woman in my life, and I wanted to surprise you when you wake up. I decided to change that after your birthday or during our monthsary, but I couldn’t wait to do it.

name: First Gift for Our First Monthsary
message: You liked a dress we passed by in front of Market-Market, and you really loved it. After church, we went back to get it, and I decided you should have it. I’ll be the one to pay for it as our first monthsary gift, and it’s my advance gift for you.

name: Celebrating Our First Monthsary
message: We decided to celebrate our first monthsary by taking a picture together in BGC. When I arrived in Rizal we took a little time for some bebe time while you were doing your makeup and fixing your hair hahahaha. We take a small picture since we dont’t have a lot of time, and we walk around to BGC and to the Zara to check the perfume for ate Apple hahahah. After that, we went to Bonchon, and I treated you to a meal since it was our first monthsary. Lastly, we went home to Rizal and just hung out, spending some time together playing 8 Ball Pool.
